---
title: "LRPITT14: Unadjusted ITT on the SES complete-case subset, word reading (matched comparator to LRPITT13)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_convergence.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPITT14 is the **unadjusted** ITT for word reading (EWRSWR) (`ewrswr`) on the **SES complete-case subset** — the matched comparator to LRPITT13. It adjusts for nothing but restricts to the same SES-complete rows (`restrict_complete`), so its $\tau$ is comparable with the sample held fixed: LRPITT13 vs LRPITT14 isolates the SES adjustment, while LRPITT14 vs the full-sample model isolates the dropped-children / selection effect. The estimand is the total effect of randomised assignment $G$ on $W_{\text{post}}$ (RCT phase only).

::: {.callout-note title="Identification and sign convention"}

Under the locked causal DAG, $G$ is a randomised root, so the ITT effect $\tau$ is
identified by the **empty adjustment set**. The own baseline, linear age are
**precision terms only** — they sharpen $\tau$ but are not what licenses the causal
interpretation. **Sign convention:** $G = 1$ is the intervention arm, so a
**positive** $\tau$ means the intervention raises the outcome.

:::

## Model

$$
\eta_i = \alpha + \tau\, G_i
       + \gamma_{\text{own}}\, \text{logit}_*(W_{\mathrm{pre},i}, N)
       + \gamma_A\, A_{\text{std},i},
$$

with Beta-Binomial likelihood $W_{\text{post},i} \sim \text{BetaBinomial}(N, \mu_i\kappa, (1-\mu_i)\kappa)$,
$\mu_i = \sigma(\eta_i)$, $N = 79$. Priors follow the shared template in `priors.py`.
No covariate adjustment; the fit is restricted to the SES complete-case rows. HSGPs are off by default.

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_diagnostics.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_results_itt.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
